title: 6PCS Christmas Glitter Leaves 63cm Artificial Boston Fern Gold Glitter Leaf Floral Picks Christmas Tree Decorations Artificial Leaves Stem for Xmas Tree Ornaments New Year Flower Arrangment
features: Package Content - You will get 6 pieces artificial leaves with stem. The total length of each picks is 63cm/25" and each picks contains 3 stems. These beautiful decorative branches can be used in many ways as decoration and are an absolute stunning in any Christmas decoration.

High Quality - The glitter fern leaves are made of high quality PE plastic and decorated with glitter. Bright colors are perfect for decorating a christmas tree or vase and bring life. The branches of this Christmas leaf are tinsel wrapped in kraft paper and can be made into any shape you prefer.

Reusable - Artificial glitter picks do not require irrigation or maintenance like real leaves, saving you a lot of time. Artificial floral sprays are odorless, non-toxic, environmentally friendly, not easily deformed, and can be kept for a long time.

DIY Ornaments - Christmas leaves decorations is eye catching ornaments for table, wreath, garland and vase. Use these glitter pick sprays to decorate your home as an indispensable decoration for xmas, festivals, holidays, weddings, for home, dining table!

Friendly Customer Support - The sequins on the boston fern leaves may fall off a little during transportation, or stick to your hands, please don't worry, just wipe it off with a wet tissue. If you have any questions about the product, please feel free to contact us!
